title: polystichum diffractum
intro: Polystichum diffractum, also known as the cut-leaf fern, is a species of fern native to China and parts of Southeast Asia. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polystichum diffractum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and improve digestion, making it a valuable herb in traditional Chinese medicine. It can be prepared through herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
